name: Potato Salad
recipeIngredient: 4 oz Snow peas, fresh and trimmed
recipeInstructions:
1. Stir together oil, white wine, lemon juice, oregano, and soy sauce.
2. Pour the mixture over the mushrooms; set aside.
3. Steam peas for 3 minutes; set aside.
4. Place potatoes in a serving bowl.
5. Add mushrooms, sauce, snow peas, ham, green bell pepper, celery, scallions, parsley to the bowl with potatoes.
6. Toss everything together with lettuce.
7. Chill.
